bullets: `/setup-toolkit` Phase 1.6 ("Analytics Paths") now captures three env vars instead of two: adds `CLAUDE_ANALYTICS_HOOKS_DIR` (write path for hook-logs JSONL, default `$HOME/claude-analytics/hook-logs`) and reframes `CLAUDE_ANALYTICS_HOOKS_DB` as read-only (used by `surface-lessons.sh` for intra-session dedup, owned and populated by the claude-sessions indexer). Detection now triggers when any of the three keys is missing. Resolves the follow-up flagged in 2.68.0's `Deferred` section.
